message:
fix(codegen): Reference submodule symbols from @imported packages

When importing from a submodule of an already @imported package
(e.g., from numpy._core.numerictypes import sctypes), generate
a reference to the module chain (const sctypes = numpy._core.numerictypes.sctypes)
instead of falling through to the null fallback.

This enables proper symbol resolution for compiled Python packages
where the submodule structure is preserved through @import chains.
